output:
# Synopsys / ANSYS Merger – Deal Term Extraction

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Target (legal entity) | ANSYS, Inc. (Delaware corporation) | Cover letter / Notice of Special Meeting |
| Acquirer (legal entity) | Synopsys, Inc. (Delaware corporation); merger vehicle: ALTA Acquisition Corp. (wholly owned subsidiary of Synopsys) | Cover page / Notice of Special Meeting |
| Announcement date | January 15, 2024 (date merger agreement was signed); public announcement referenced as January 12, 2024 trading day prior | Cover letter ("On January 15, 2024..."); Notice of Special Meeting |
| Closing date (or expected closing) | NOT STATED (specific date); document notes "The merger is expected to be completed in the…" (text truncated) | Notice of Special Meeting – "Conditions to the Completion of the Merger" section |
| Total enterprise value (EV) | NOT STATED | — |
| Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value) | Mixed cash and stock: (i) $197.00 per share in cash, plus (ii) 0.3450 share of Synopsys common stock per Ansys share (fixed exchange ratio), plus cash in lieu of fractional shares. Implied per-share value: ~$390.19 (based on SNPS close $559.96 on 12/21/2023); ~$367.57 (based on SNPS close $494.40 on 1/12/2024); ~$393.30 (based on SNPS close $568.99 on 4/9/2024) | Cover letter ("Merger Consideration"); Notice of Special Meeting – "Merger Consideration" |
| Implied premium to undisturbed share price | NOT STATED (premium % not explicitly given; only implied per-share consideration values disclosed) | — |
| Financial advisor to acquirer | NOT STATED in provided excerpt | — |
| Financial advisor to target | NOT STATED in provided excerpt | — |
| Legal advisor to target (Ansys) | Skadden, Arps, Slate, Meagher & Flom LLP (Mike Ringler, Peter Jones) — Palo Alto, CA | S-4/A cover page (counsel block for Ansys) |
| Legal advisor to acquirer (Synopsys) | Cleary Gottlieb Steen & Hamilton LLP (Christopher R. Moore, Paul Shim, Helena Grannis) — for reference only | S-4/A cover page |
| Key conditions to closing (top 3) | (1) Adoption of merger agreement by required Ansys stockholder vote (majority of outstanding shares); (2) Expiration/termination of HSR waiting period and receipt of required foreign antitrust/foreign investment approvals in specified jurisdictions; (3) Effectiveness of the S-4 registration statement and approval for listing of Synopsys shares to be issued on NASDAQ (also: no injunction/legal restraint preventing closing) | Notice of Special Meeting – "Conditions to the Completion of the Merger" |
| Termination fee payable by target (Ansys) | NOT STATED in provided excerpt | — |
| Termination fee payable by acquirer (Synopsys) | NOT STATED in provided excerpt | — |

**Notes / caveats:**
- The provided excerpt is the front matter of the S-4/A (cover, letter to stockholders, notice of special meeting, and beginning of conditions section). Several customary deal-term disclosures (financial advisors, fairness opinions, termination fees, expected closing date, EV) typically appear later in the proxy (e.g., "Background of the Merger," "Opinion of Financial Advisor," "The Merger Agreement—Termination Fees") and were truncated from the document supplied.
- The exchange ratio is fixed and subject to a 19.9999% maximum-share-issuance cap, with a corresponding cash adjustment mechanism (per cover letter / "Merger Consideration").
- Pro forma ownership: Ansys holders ~16.5%; Synopsys holders ~83.5% of combined company (Notice of Special Meeting).

# Activision Blizzard / Microsoft Merger — Deal Terms Summary

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Target (legal entity) | Activision Blizzard, Inc. | Cover page / Notice of Special Meeting |
| Acquirer (legal entity) | Microsoft Corporation (with Anchorage Merger Sub Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Microsoft, as merger sub) | Cover letter, dated March 21, 2022 |
| Announcement date | January 18, 2022 (date of Merger Agreement); referenced as announced after market close on January 14, 2022 | Cover letter; Proxy Summary |
| Closing date (or expected closing) | NOT STATED (specific date); proxy references "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger" section but no specific date provided in the excerpt | Table of Contents, p. 28 |
| Total enterprise value (EV) | NOT STATED in the provided excerpt | — |
| Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value) | All-cash; $95.00 per share in cash, without interest, for each share of Activision Blizzard common stock (par value $0.000001) | Cover letter, March 21, 2022 |
| Implied premium to undisturbed share price | Approximately 45.3% premium to closing stock price on January 14, 2022 (last trading day prior to announcement); approximately 50.3% premium to 30-trading-day VWAP ended January 14, 2022 | Cover letter, March 21, 2022 |
| Financial advisor to acquirer (Microsoft) | NOT STATED in the provided excerpt | — |
| Financial advisor to target (Activision Blizzard) | Allen & Company LLC | Annex C — "Opinion of Allen & Company LLC"; Table of Contents |
| Legal advisor to target | NOT STATED in the provided excerpt | — |
| Key conditions to closing (top 3) | Per the Table of Contents, "Conditions to the Closing of the Merger" is described on p. 89, but specific conditions are not enumerated in the provided excerpt. Generally referenced: (1) stockholder approval — affirmative vote of holders of a majority of outstanding Activision Blizzard common stock; (2) Regulatory Approvals (referenced on p. 69); (3) Other customary closing conditions — NOT STATED in detail | Notice of Special Meeting; Table of Contents, pp. 69, 89 |
| Termination fee payable by target | NOT STATED (specific amount); referenced as "Termination Fee" in Proxy Summary p. 13 and Terms of the Merger Agreement p. 92, but amount not provided in the excerpt | Table of Contents, pp. 13, 92 |
| Termination fee payable by acquirer (reverse termination fee) | NOT STATED (specific amount); referenced as "Reverse Termination Fee" in Proxy Summary p. 13 and Terms of the Merger Agreement p. 93, but amount not provided in the excerpt | Table of Contents, pp. 13, 93 |

**Note:** Several fields are marked "NOT STATED" because the provided document excerpt was truncated and did not include the body sections (e.g., pp. 89–93 covering closing conditions and termination fee amounts, or financial/legal advisor disclosures for the acquirer and target's legal counsel). The full proxy statement would likely contain these values.

| Financial advisor to acquirer | NOT STATED (in the provided excerpt) | — |
| Financial advisor to target | Goldman Sachs & Co. | Table of Contents – "Opinion of Goldman Sachs & Co." (pp. 9, 54) |
| Legal advisor to target | NOT STATED (in the provided excerpt) | — |
| Key conditions to closing (top 3) | NOT STATED in detail in the provided excerpt; the proxy references a "Conditions to the Closing of the Merger" section (and requires the affirmative vote of a majority of outstanding Juniper shares to adopt the Merger Agreement) | Table of Contents – "Conditions to the Closing of the Merger" (p. 92); Cover letter (stockholder approval) |
| Termination fee payable by target | NOT STATED in the provided excerpt (referenced in "Termination Fees" section, p. 94) | Table of Contents – "Termination Fees" (p. 94) |

Note: The provided document excerpt is truncated. Several fields (premium, advisor to acquirer, target legal advisor, specific closing conditions, and termination fee amounts) are referenced in the Table of Contents but their substantive disclosures fall in sections of the proxy not included in the excerpt, so they are marked "NOT STATED" to avoid invented values.

# Acacia Communications / Cisco Systems Merger — Deal Terms Extraction

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Target (legal entity) | Acacia Communications, Inc. (Delaware corporation) | Cover letter / "Parties to the Merger" (p. 37 / Summary p. 1) |
| Acquirer (legal entity) | Cisco Systems, Inc. (Delaware corporation, reincorporated from California on January 25, 2021); merger effected via wholly owned subsidiary Amarone Acquisition Corp. (Merger Sub) | Cover letter; "Parties to the Merger" (Summary p. 1) |
| Announcement date | Original merger agreement announced July 9, 2019 (dated July 8, 2019); Amended and Restated Merger Agreement announced January 14, 2021 (dated January 14, 2021) | Cover letter (introductory paragraphs) |
| Closing date (or expected closing) | NOT STATED (specific expected closing date not disclosed in the provided excerpt; proxy references "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger" on p. 35, content not included) | TOC reference p. 35; specific date not in excerpt |
| Total enterprise value (EV) | NOT STATED | Not disclosed in provided excerpt |
| Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value) | All-cash: $115.00 per share of Company common stock, without interest and subject to required tax withholding | Cover letter ("merger consideration" paragraph) |
| Implied premium to undisturbed share price | NOT STATED | Not disclosed in provided excerpt |
| Financial advisor to acquirer | NOT STATED | Not disclosed in provided excerpt |
| Financial advisor to target | Goldman Sachs (fairness opinion attached as Annex B; "Opinion of the Company's Financial Advisor") | TOC p. 68; Annex B |
| Legal advisor to target | NOT STATED (Janene I. Asgeirsson is identified as Acacia's Chief Legal Officer & Secretary, but outside legal counsel is not named in the provided excerpt) | Notice of Special Meeting signature block |
| Key conditions to closing (top 3) | NOT STATED in detail in excerpt; section "Conditions to the Merger" referenced on p. 127 (content not included). Stockholder approval (majority of outstanding shares) is expressly required per cover letter; regulatory approvals referenced on p. 104 | Cover letter (stockholder vote); TOC pp. 104, 127 |
| Termination fee payable by target | NOT STATED in provided excerpt (section "Termination Fee" referenced on p. 129) | TOC p. 129 |
| Termination fee payable by acquirer | NOT STATED in provided excerpt (section "Termination Fee" referenced on p. 129) | TOC p. 129 |

### Notes / Caveats
- The document provided is the front matter and table of contents of the DEFM14A; several relevant sections (Conditions to the Merger p. 127, Termination Fee p. 129, Regulatory Approvals p. 104, Opinion of Goldman Sachs detail p. 68, Anticipated Date of Completion p. 35) are referenced in the TOC but their substantive content was truncated and therefore specific values (premium, termination fees, closing conditions, advisor to Cisco, target legal counsel) could not be verified from the excerpt.
- Per-share consideration of **$115.00 cash** is firmly stated in the cover letter; this represents an increase from the original July 2019 deal (originally $70.00/share, per public record) — but that comparative figure is **NOT STATED** in the excerpt provided, so it has not been included as a sourced value.
